REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAMES, GINA A.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. TONY LONG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
